'''''Star Wars: Episode I Adventures''''' was a young-readers series and [[roleplaying game]] published by [[Scholastic]] to coincide with the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The books were written by [[Ryder Windham]], [[Dave Wolverton]], and [[A. L. Singer]]. ''Episode I Adventures'' was the follow-up to Scholastic's previous ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' series.

==Media==
{{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I Adventures}}
''Star Wars: Episode I Adventures'' originally shipped to subscribers in a black cardboard box featuring diagram illustrations of the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]] on top and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droid starfighter]] on the bottom. This box contained a [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] carrying case, referred to as the ''Star Wars: Episode I Adventures'' Headquarters, which further contained the following items:
*12 Adventure Cards
*2 Adventure Dice, 10-sided and 20-sided
*Adventure Notebook, to keep track of your adventures
*Point Pad
*1 Adventure Poster
*1 [[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi|Adventure Novel]]
*1 [[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi|Game Book]]
*1 [[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures|Adventure Guide]]
*1 ''Episode I Adventures'' I.D. Card
*[[Star Wars Kids (1999) 1|''Star Wars Kids'' (1999) 1]]
